personal.name: Thirumurugan Candane
personal.title: Full Stack Engineer
personal.subtitle: Engineering Scalable Systems & Real-Time Experiences
personal.tagline: I design and build high-performance systems, from low-level file structures to real-time cloud applications, blending backend precision with seamless user experiences.

about.bio: Backend and systems engineer with 3+ years of experience building high-performance, scalable systems at Zoho. Specialized in low-level engineering, concurrency, and designing architectures for efficient large-scale data processing.
about.bio2: Built a custom NTFS filesystem driver in Rust for flexible disk imaging, eliminating traditional constraints on storage replication. Designed multicast-based data distribution systems and high-throughput upload servers optimized for low latency and efficient resource utilization. Strong focus on distributed systems, file systems, and performance-critical backend infrastructure.

experience.description: Working on high-performance backend systems and system-level engineering. Focused on building scalable, low-latency architectures involving file systems, large-scale data transfer, and efficient I/O workflows.
achievements: Engineered a custom read-only NTFS driver in Rust for disk imaging, removing constraints on source-target disk sizes
Designed a multicast-based data transmission system for efficient large-scale deployments
Architected a high-throughput upload server optimized for large file transfers with low latency and concurrency control
Optimized system-level data pipelines improving I/O efficiency and memory utilization
Built and integrated REST APIs for distributed backend services

experience.description: Developed cross-platform mobile applications using Flutter with backend integrations. Focused on building scalable mobile features and improving user experience.
achievements: Built cross-platform mobile applications using Flutter integrated with REST APIs
Implemented AI-driven features to enhance application functionality
Collaborated with teams to debug and optimize performance issues

projects.title: NTFS Filesystem Driver
projects.subtitle: Low-Level Systems Project (Rust)
projects.description: Built a custom read-only NTFS filesystem driver in Rust for disk imaging. Handles file record parsing, data runs, and enables efficient disk operations without requiring identical source and target disk sizes.

projects.title: High-Throughput Upload Server
projects.subtitle: Backend & Systems Engineering
projects.description: Designed a high-performance upload server optimized for large file transfers. Focused on low latency, concurrency control, and efficient resource utilization for handling large-scale data workloads.

projects.title: Multicast Data Transmission
projects.subtitle: Distributed Systems Module
projects.description: Implemented a multicast-based data transmission system to efficiently broadcast data to multiple clients, improving scalability and reducing redundant network usage.

projects.title: AmSt Chat Application
projects.subtitle: Real-Time Messaging App
projects.description: Developed a real-time chat application supporting text, image, and video messaging using Firebase. Integrated authentication and scalable messaging features.

projects.title: LeafX
projects.subtitle: AI Plant Disease Detection
projects.description: Built a mobile application using Flutter and a Flask backend to predict plant diseases and provide treatment suggestions based on input data.
